message:
fix: resolve merge conflict in config — integrate both safety and spawn-pacing defaults

Two concurrent agents added config fields: one added Safety/Preflight/Redaction/
Privacy/Encryption with their validators, and the other added SpawnPacing with its
validator. Both are legitimate additions backed by their respective implementations.
This commit merges both sides.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
